message:
test(fwc): simplify mesh availability fail-closed test to use unreachable address

Remove mock-host spawn from the mesh availability explicit-states test
and use an unreachable address (127.0.0.1:9) instead. The test asserts
fail-closed behavior, so a real unreachable endpoint is more honest than
a mock that returns a controlled response.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
